examples: This is subjectivism and relativism run amuck.
Let your imagination run amuck and create the world that you would wish to be in.
The Spaniards ran amuck in Chinese quarter and pillaged their jurks in the harbour.
Prison guard (later Inspector) Javert is the voice of the rule-of-law principle run amuck.
Across this country in offices and construction sites and classrooms competitive juices run amuck as the Fantasy Draft for the 2012 season takes place.
